2014h26a-q001.stem_jp_clean:
商品の販売数が500個のときの営業利益は表のとおりである。販売単価を10%値下げしたとき，損益分岐点の売上高は何円か。ここで，商品1個当たりの変動費及び販売数は，販売単価の値下げの前後で変わらないものとする。

| 項目 | 金額 |

| 費用 |  |

| 　固定費 | 300,000 |

stem.zh:
当商品销售量为500个时的营业利润如表所示。当销售单价下调10%时，盈亏平衡点的销售额为多少日元？此处，每个商品的变动成本及销售量在销售单价下调前后均保持不变。

| 项目 | 金额 |
| --- | --- |

| 　固定成本 | 300,000 |
| 营业利润 | 276,000 |
stem.en:
The operating profit when the sales volume of a product is 500 units is shown in the table. When the unit selling price is reduced by 10%, what is the break-even point sales (in yen)? Here, assume that the variable cost per unit and the sales volume remain unchanged before and after the price reduction.

Unit: yen

| Item | Amount |
| --- | --- |
| Sales | 900,000 |
| Expenses |  |
| 　Variable cost | 324,000 |
| 　Fixed cost | 300,000 |
| Operating profit | 276,000 |

stem.zh:
关于出资方与被投资企业之间的关系，下列描述中填入 a、b 的字句的恰当组合是哪一个？

A 公司为了提高对被投资方 B 公司的 a，可采取的行为是 b。
stem.en:
Regarding the relationship between an investor and the company it invests in, which combination of words to fill in a and b in the following statement is appropriate?

As an action for Company A to strengthen its a over Company B, in which it has invested, there is b.

ア.zh: a: 经营控制力 / b: 部分出售股份
ア.en: a: managerial control / b: selling off part of the shares

イ.zh: a: 经营控制力 / b: 增持股份

ウ.en: a: shareholding ratio / b: dispatching an auditor

エ.en: a: shareholding ratio / b: dispatching a director

ア.en: CRM

イ.zh: HRM
イ.en: HRM

ウ.zh: PPM
ウ.en: PPM

エ.zh: SCM

stem.zh: 关于 TOB（要约收购）的说明，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of a TOB (Take-Over Bid)?

ア.zh: 以取得经营权或参股为目的，公告拟收购的股数、价格、期限等，在股票市场之外向不特定多数股东收购股票。
ア.en: To acquire management control or take an equity stake by publicly announcing the number of shares to be bought, the price, the deadline, etc., and buying up shares from a large unspecified number of shareholders outside the stock market.

イ.zh: 以取得经营权为目的，由经营层或骨干员工从母公司等处收购股票或营业资产。
イ.en: To acquire management control by having the management team or senior employees buy up the shares or business assets from the parent company, etc.

ウ.zh: 以筹集业务所需资金为目的，将本公司的股票在股票市场上首次公开上市。
ウ.en: To raise the funds needed for the business by newly listing the company's own shares on the stock market for the first time.

エ.zh: 以履行社会责任为目的，不仅追求利润，还开展贡献社会、关爱环境的活动。
エ.en: To fulfill social responsibility by not only pursuing profit but also carrying out activities that contribute to society and consider the environment.

stem.zh: 关于 BSC（Balanced Scorecard，平衡计分卡）的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of the BSC (Balanced Scorecard)?

ア.zh: 表示某一时点的资金筹措与资金运用状况的会计报告书
ア.en: An accounting report that shows the state of fund procurement and fund utilization at a certain point in time

イ.zh: 以最低的总成本可靠地实现所需功能的分析方法
イ.en: An analysis method for reliably achieving the required functions at the lowest total cost

ウ.zh: 从财务、客户、业务流程、学习与成长这些视角进行企业业绩评价的方法
ウ.en: A method of evaluating corporate performance from the perspectives of finance, customers, business processes, and learning and growth

エ.zh: 电子商务中企业与消费者之间进行的交易
エ.en: Among electronic commerce, the transactions conducted between businesses and consumers

stem.zh: 作为专利战略之一的交叉许可，最恰当的说明是哪一项？
stem.en: Which is the most appropriate explanation of cross-licensing, one of the patent strategies?

ア.zh: 通过吸收合并拥有本公司所不具备技术的企业，从而获得该企业所拥有的专利。
ア.en: Acquiring the patents held by another company by absorbing and merging with that company, which possesses technology the firm itself lacks.

イ.zh: 为了补充本公司所欠缺的技术并进行专利申请，与本公司以外的组织开展共同研究。
イ.en: Conducting joint research with an organization outside the firm in order to supplement technology the firm lacks and to file patent applications.

ウ.zh: 将本公司的专利开放给其他公司，并作为对价获得与之相称的专利使用费。
ウ.en: Opening the firm's own patents to other companies and, in return, receiving royalties commensurate with their use.

エ.zh: 专利权利人之间就各自所拥有的权利，相互许可对方使用。
エ.en: Patent right holders mutually granting each other permission to use the rights that each of them owns.

某企业的损益表如表所示，该会计期间的经常利润为多少百万日元？

stem.zh: 关于借记卡（debit card）的描述，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of a debit card?

ア.zh: 预先将可用金额记录在卡中、用完即止的预付方式。
ア.en: A prepaid method in which the available amount is recorded on the card in advance and used up until depleted.

イ.zh: 购买商品时，货款会立即从金融机构的存款账户中扣除的方式。
イ.en: A method in which the payment is immediately deducted from a deposit account at a financial institution at the time of purchase.

ウ.zh: 在购买商品或使用服务时出示即可完成货款结算的后付方式。
ウ.en: A postpaid method that allows payment settlement by presenting the card when buying goods or using services.

エ.zh: 可在所充值金额范围内使用、并能反复补充金额的预付方式。
エ.en: A prepaid method that can be used up to the amount charged and allows the amount to be replenished repeatedly.

stem.zh: 关于制造业中使用的 CAD 的说明，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of CAD as used in manufacturing?

ア.zh: 根据产品的生产计划计算出所需物料的需求量，并进行物料的采购安排。
ア.en: It calculates the required quantity of materials according to the product's production plan and arranges the procurement of those materials.

イ.zh: 管理产品制造所需的零部件、中间产品以及需求量等信息。
イ.en: It manages information such as the parts, intermediate products, and required quantities needed to manufacture the product.

ウ.zh: 对产品的设计图、零件表等从设计到制造相关的信息进行统一管理。
ウ.en: It centrally manages information related to everything from design to manufacturing, such as the product's design drawings and parts lists.

エ.zh: 在产品设计中利用计算机，以提高设计工作的生产效率和可靠性。
エ.en: It uses computers in product design to improve the productivity and reliability of the design work.

stem.zh: 希望根据最终产品的交货期和制造量，优化制造所需构成零部件的库存量。为实现这一目的，下列措施中最恰当的是哪一项？

ウ.zh: 构建 POS 系统
ウ.en: Building a POS system

エ.zh: 构建 SFA 系统
エ.en: Building an SFA system

stem.zh: 为支持企业经营的决策，按主题（目的）组织起来的时间序列数据集合称为什么？
stem.en: What is the name for a collection of time-series data that is organized by subject (purpose) in order to support decision-making in business management?

ア.en: Data warehouse

イ.zh: 数据中心
イ.en: Data center

ウ.zh: 数据流图

エ.zh: 数据挖掘
エ.en: Data mining

2014h26a-q017.stem_jp_clean: 自社の給与マスタの更新権限をもつ社員が, 自身の給与を増額するよう給与マスタの内容を改ざんした。その事実が, 給与支給前に発覚した。データの改ざんを行ったこの社員を処罰する法律として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 拥有本公司工资主数据更新权限的员工，为提高自己的工资而篡改了工资主数据的内容。该事实在发放工资之前被发现。作为处罚这名篡改数据员工的法律，恰当的是哪一个？
stem.en: An employee who has update privileges for the company's payroll master data tampered with the contents of the payroll master data in order to increase their own salary. This fact was discovered before salaries were paid. Which law is appropriate for punishing this employee who tampered with the data?

ア.zh: 刑法
ア.en: Penal Code

イ.zh: 个人信息保护法
イ.en: Act on the Protection of Personal Information

ウ.zh: 电气通信事业法
ウ.en: Telecommunications Business Act

エ.zh: 禁止非法访问法
エ.en: Unauthorized Access Prohibition Act

2014h26a-q018.stem_jp_clean:
経営状態に関する次の情報のうち, 上場企業に有価証券報告書での開示が義務付けられている情報だけを全て挙げたものはどれか。

stem.zh:
在下列有关经营状况的信息中,只把上市公司被要求在有价证券报告书中披露的信息全部列出的是哪一项?
a 现金流量表 b 市场份额 c 损益表 d 资产负债表
stem.en:
Among the following information about a company's management status, which option lists all and only the information that listed companies are required to disclose in their securities report (yukashoken hokokusho)?
a Cash Flow Statement  b Market share  c Income Statement  d Balance Sheet

ア.zh: a, b, c
ア.en: a, b, c

2014h26a-q019.stem_jp_clean: PPM (Product Portfolio Management) で“問題児”と呼ばれる領域の特徴として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在 PPM（产品组合管理，Product Portfolio Management）中，被称为“问题儿童”的领域，其特征是下列哪一项？
stem.en: In PPM (Product Portfolio Management), which of the following is a characteristic of the area called the "Problem Child" (Question Mark)?

ア.zh: 市场占有率高，不需要为扩大业务而进行积极投资，因此成为收益来源。
ア.en: It has a high market share and does not require aggressive investment to expand the business, so it serves as a source of revenue.

イ.zh: 凭借市场的成长和较高的占有率带来巨大的销售额，但为了维持竞争力需要持续投资。
イ.en: Market growth and a high market share bring large sales, but continuous investment is required to maintain competitiveness.

ウ.zh: 市场成长率和市场占有率都很低，无法寄予长期的业务期望，因此必须考虑撤退。
ウ.en: Both the market growth rate and the market share are low, and no long-term business prospects can be expected, so withdrawal must also be considered.

エ.zh: 市场正在成长但占有率很低，为了将其培养成今后的收益支柱业务，需要进行积极投资。
エ.en: The market is growing but the market share is low, so aggressive investment is required to develop it into a future pillar of revenue.

stem.zh: 作为基于绿色 IT 理念的举措实例，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate example of an initiative based on the concept of Green IT?

ア.zh: 使用经过特别设计、可减轻 LED 蓝光对眼睛造成疲劳的显示器。
ア.en: Use a display designed to reduce eye fatigue caused by the blue light of LEDs.

イ.zh: 在服务器机房的出入口安装风淋（空气淋浴）装置。
イ.en: Install an air shower device at the entrance of the server room.

ウ.zh: 构建为应对灾害而准备的备份系统。
ウ.en: Build a backup system to prepare for disasters.

エ.zh: 原则上限制将资料打印到纸张，仅限在 PC 显示器上阅览。
エ.en: As a rule, restrict printing documents on paper and limit reading to viewing on a PC display.

2014h26a-q021.stem_jp_clean:
個人情報保護法における“個人情報”だけを全て挙げたものはどれか。
a 記号や数字だけからなるハンドルネームを集めたファイル
b 購入した職員録に載っている取引先企業の役職と社員名

a 仅由符号或数字构成的网名（昵称）所汇集成的文件
b 购买来的职员名录中所载的往来企业的职务与员工姓名
c 电话簿上所载的姓名、住址和电话号码
d 往来企业对接人的名片数据库
stem.en:
Which option lists all and only the items that qualify as "personal information" under the Act on the Protection of Personal Information?
a A file collecting handle names (nicknames) made up of only symbols and numbers
b The job titles and employee names of business-partner companies listed in a purchased employee directory
c Names, addresses, and phone numbers listed in a telephone directory
d A business card database of contact persons at business-partner companies

ア.zh: a，b
ア.en: a, b

イ.zh: a，c，d
イ.en: a, c, d

ウ.zh: b，c
ウ.en: b, c

エ.zh: b，c，d
エ.en: b, c, d

stem.en: Which is the management approach of entrusting part of a company's own business processes to an external provider?

ア.zh: BPO
ア.en: BPO

イ.zh: BTO
イ.en: BTO

ウ.zh: MBO
ウ.en: MBO

エ.zh: OJT
エ.en: OJT

2014h26a-q023.stem_jp_clean: インターネット上の脅威となる行為のうち, 不正アクセス禁止法で禁止されているものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在互联网上构成威胁的行为中, 哪一项是《禁止非法访问法》所禁止的?
stem.en: Among the acts that pose threats on the Internet, which one is prohibited by the Unauthorized Access Prohibition Act?

ア.zh: 利用安全漏洞侵入 Web 网站。
ア.en: Exploiting a security hole to break into a website.

イ.zh: 通过非法数据发送或大量流量等手段, 对目标计算机或网络设备施加负载, 使其无法提供服务。
イ.en: Putting load on a target's computer or network equipment through illegitimate data transmission or massive traffic, making the service unavailable.

ウ.zh: 解析截获的无线 LAN 电波, 读取竞争对手的技术信息。

stem.zh: 关于监事职责的说明，恰当的是哪一项？

stem.zh: 作为商业模式专利，可依据专利法获得专利权认可的对象是哪一项？

ア.zh: 一种利用 IT 的新型接单机制，能够按照客户的需求对 PC 进行定制。
ア.en: A new IT-based order-taking mechanism that can customize PCs to meet customer requests.

イ.zh: 利用计算机制作的新产品设计文档。
イ.en: A design document for a new product created using a computer.

ウ.zh: 将原本在本公司专用服务器上运行的程序原样迁移到云计算上的产物。
ウ.en: A program that was running on the company's dedicated server, moved as-is to cloud computing.

エ.zh: 为高速完成大规模、复杂模型的解析而开发的高性能计算机。

stem.zh: 作为分析顾客购买行为的购物篮分析（篮子分析）的实例，恰当的是哪一项？

イ.zh: 分析到便利店的顾客一起购买的商品。
イ.en: Analyzing the products that customers visiting a convenience store buy together.

ウ.zh: 分析超市所销售的各商品类别的收益率。

エ.en: Analyzing the visit frequency and purchase amount of customers who come to a supermarket.

2014h26a-q029.stem_jp_clean:
導入を検討している機械の経済性評価を行う。取得費用が1,906万円で、耐用年数は10年間である。導入によって、毎年、110万円の利益を得られる。また、保守費用として毎年取得費用の1%が発生する。この機械への投下資本利益率、すなわち機械への投資に対する利益の割合は何%か。
なお、投下資本利益率は、次の式で算出するものとする。
投下資本利益率 (%) = 利益 ÷ 投下資本 × 100

stem.zh:
对正在考虑引入的某台机器进行经济性评价。取得费用为1,906万日元，使用年限为10年。引入后，每年可获得110万日元的利润。此外，每年还会发生相当于取得费用1%的维护费用。该机器的投下资本利润率，即对该机器投资所对应的利润比例为多少%？
另外，投下资本利润率按下式计算。
投下资本利润率 (%) = 利润 ÷ 投下资本 × 100
stem.en:
You are evaluating the economic efficiency of a machine being considered for introduction. Its acquisition cost is 19.06 million yen, and its service life is 10 years. By introducing it, you can obtain a profit of 1.1 million yen every year. In addition, a maintenance cost equal to 1% of the acquisition cost is incurred every year. What is the return on invested capital for this machine, that is, the ratio of profit to the investment in the machine, in %?
Note that the return on invested capital is calculated by the following formula.
Return on invested capital (%) = Profit ÷ Invested capital × 100

stem.zh: 制定信息系统战略的主要目的，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is the main purpose of formulating an information systems strategy?

ア.zh: 明确对新构建的业务和信息系统的需求，并以此为基础确定 IT 化的范围并明示其具体功能。
ア.en: Clarify the requirements for the business and information systems to be newly built, and based on that, determine the scope of IT adoption and specify its concrete functions.

イ.zh: 基于经营战略明确整个信息系统的应有形态，确定作为组织的整个信息系统的整体优化方针。
イ.en: Based on the management strategy, clarify the ideal form of the entire information system, and determine the overall optimization policy for the organization's whole information system.

ウ.zh: 为了信息系统开发，作为组织确定开发方法和管理方法，并基于这些设定开发与管理的标准流程。
ウ.en: For information system development, decide the development method and management method as an organization, and based on them, set the standard procedures for development and management.

エ.zh: 整理关于目标业务的信息系统构建的需求事项，制定其系统化方针和构建的实施计划。
エ.en: Organize the requirements concerning the construction of the information system for the target business, and create the systematization policy and the implementation plan for its construction.

2014h26a-q031.stem_jp_clean: サービスレベル管理において，サービス提供者と利用者の間で合意した応答時間について，図に示す工程で継続的に改善活動を行う。モニタリングで実施するものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在服务级别管理中，针对服务提供者与用户之间约定的响应时间，按图中所示的步骤持续开展改进活动。在监控（Monitoring）步骤中实施的是哪一项？
stem.en: In service level management, continual improvement activities are carried out for the response time agreed between the service provider and the user, following the steps shown in the figure. Which of the following is performed in the monitoring step?

ア.zh: 对响应时间进行监视
ア.en: Monitoring of the response time

イ.zh: 对响应时间的实际成绩进行评价
イ.en: Evaluation of the actual response time results

ウ.zh: 缩短响应时间
ウ.en: Reduction of the response time

エ.zh: 设定或变更响应时间的目标
エ.en: Setting or changing the response time target

2014h26a-q032.stem_jp_clean:
あるITサービスでは, システムの変更の優先度を即時, 高, 中, 低の四段階に定めている。提案された変更のうち, 即時と判断されるべき変更はどれか。ここで, 変更の定期的なリリースは毎月末に実施されているものとする。

| 優先度 | 説明 |
|---|---|
| 即時 | 生命を危険にさらす, 又は重要な公的サービスの提供能力を大きく減じるものであり, 直ちに対応する。 |
| 高 | 何人かの重要な利用者に深刻な影響を及ぼす, 又は多くの利用者に影響を与えるものであり, 迅速に対応する。 |
| 中 | 深刻な影響はないが, 次の定期リリースまでは延期できない。 |
| 低 | 変更は必要であるが, 次の定期リリースまで待つことができる。 |

stem.zh:
某 IT 服务将系统变更的优先级划分为即时、高、中、低四个等级。在提出的变更中，应被判定为“即时”的变更是哪一项？此处假定变更的定期发布在每月月末实施。

| 优先级 | 说明 |
|---|---|
| 即时 | 危及生命，或大幅削弱重要公共服务的提供能力，须立即处理。 |
| 高 | 对若干重要用户造成严重影响，或影响众多用户，须迅速处理。 |
| 中 | 无严重影响，但无法推迟到下一次定期发布。 |
| 低 | 变更虽有必要，但可以等到下一次定期发布。 |
stem.en:
An IT service classifies the priority of system changes into four levels: immediate, high, medium, and low. Among the proposed changes, which one should be judged as 'immediate'? Assume that periodic releases of changes are carried out at the end of every month.

| Priority | Description |
|---|---|
| Immediate | Endangers life or greatly reduces the ability to provide important public services; must be handled immediately. |
| High | Has a serious impact on some important users, or affects many users; must be handled promptly. |
| Medium | No serious impact, but cannot be postponed until the next periodic release. |
| Low | The change is necessary, but it can wait until the next periodic release. |

ア.zh: 为两周后新服务的启动所需的辅助性查询界面的功能改进而进行的系统变更
ア.en: A system change for improving the functions of a supplementary inquiry screen needed for the launch of a new service two weeks later

イ.zh: 针对企业内拥有众多用户的电子会议系统的故障对策而进行的系统变更
イ.en: A system change for failure countermeasures of an electronic conferencing system that has many users within the company

ウ.zh: 针对用于判断是否发布地区避难劝告的灾害信息提供系统的故障对策而进行的系统变更
ウ.en: A system change for failure countermeasures of a disaster information service system used to decide whether to issue regional evacuation advisories

エ.zh: 只需在次月处理日之前完成漏洞修复即可的程序修改
エ.en: A program modification for which bug fixes only need to be completed by the processing day of the next month

2014h26a-q033.stem_jp_clean: 現行システムを新システムに切り替えるに当たり, システム移行計画書を作成した。システム移行計画書に記載すべき事項として, 適切なものはどれか。

ア.en: The selection policy for the system

イ.zh: 关于新旧系统并行运行的时间安排

ウ.zh: 关于新系统交付物的质量评价尺度

エ.en: The work experience of the project members

2014h26a-q034.stem_jp_clean: 企業におけるガバナンスには, ITガバナンスとコーポレートガバナンスなどがある。ITガバナンスの位置付けとして適切な説明はどれか。

stem.zh: 企业治理包括 IT 治理和公司治理等。关于 IT 治理的定位，下列哪项说明是恰当的？
stem.en: Governance in a company includes IT governance, corporate governance, and others. Which of the following is an appropriate explanation of how IT governance is positioned?

ア.zh: IT 治理和公司治理是相同的概念。
ア.en: IT governance and corporate governance are the same concept.

イ.zh: IT 治理和公司治理是相互对立的概念。
イ.en: IT governance and corporate governance are conflicting concepts.

ウ.zh: 公司治理是 IT 治理的组成要素之一。
ウ.en: Corporate governance is one of the components of IT governance.

エ.zh: 对于公司治理而言，IT 治理是不可或缺的要素之一。
エ.en: IT governance is one of the indispensable elements for corporate governance.

2014h26a-q035.stem_jp_clean:
システムの開発を外部のベンダに委託する際に, 納期及び品質を取り決めることにしている。調達に関する活動a〜dのうち, 取り決めた納期と品質を実現するために不可欠な活動として, 適切なものだけを全て挙げたものはどれか。
a ベンダからの成果物の受入れテストを実施する。
b ベンダとの間で, 進捗確認と問題解決のための共同レビューを行う。
c ベンダとの間で, 取り決めたことについての合意文書を取り交わす。
d ベンダへの支払は, 委託契約の支払条件に従って実行する。

stem.zh:
在将系统开发委托给外部供应商时，约定了交付期限和质量。在与采购相关的活动a～d中，作为实现所约定的交付期限和质量必不可少的活动，仅将适当的活动全部列出的是哪一项？
a 实施对供应商交付物的验收测试。
b 与供应商之间进行用于进度确认和问题解决的联合评审。
c 与供应商之间就所约定的内容互换签订协议文件。
d 对供应商的付款按照委托合同的付款条件执行。
stem.en:
When outsourcing system development to an external vendor, the delivery deadline and quality are agreed upon. Among procurement-related activities a to d, which option lists all and only the activities that are essential for achieving the agreed delivery deadline and quality?
a Conduct acceptance testing of the deliverables from the vendor.
b Hold joint reviews with the vendor for progress confirmation and problem resolution.
c Exchange an agreement document with the vendor regarding what has been agreed upon.
d Make payments to the vendor in accordance with the payment terms of the outsourcing contract.

ア.zh: a，b，c
ア.en: a, b, c

イ.zh: a，b，d
イ.en: a, b, d

ウ.zh: a，c，d
ウ.en: a, c, d

エ.zh: b，c，d
エ.en: b, c, d

stem.zh: 关于邮件系统的服务管理 PDCA 循环，符合 C（Check，检查）的是哪一项？
stem.en: In the PDCA cycle of service management for an email system, which of the following corresponds to C (Check)?

ア.zh: 为缩短邮件系统的响应时间，提出了重新审视服务器配置的方案。
ア.en: Proposed reviewing the server configuration in order to shorten the email system's response time.

イ.zh: 设定了邮件系统可用率等目标值，并明确了所需的资源。
イ.en: Set target values such as the email system's availability, and clarified the necessary resources.

ウ.zh: 测量邮件系统的故障次数和恢复时间以计算可用率，并与目标值进行比较。
ウ.en: Measured the number of failures and recovery time of the email system to calculate the availability, and compared it against the target values.

エ.zh: 按照邮件系统的设计内容，实施了文件分配等系统的搭建作业。
エ.en: Carried out system setup work such as file allocation, following the design details of the email system.

2014h26a-q037.stem_jp_clean: システム開発プロジェクトで作成されるドキュメントのうち, 開発の対象範囲を規定するものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在系统开发项目中编制的文档里，规定开发对象范围的是哪一个？
stem.en: Among the documents created in a system development project, which one defines the scope of development?

ア.zh: 迁移计划书
ア.en: Migration plan

イ.zh: 集成测试规格书
イ.en: Integration test specification

ウ.zh: 需求定义书
ウ.en: Requirements definition document

エ.zh: 用户手册
エ.en: User manual

2014h26a-q038.stem_jp_clean:
コミュニケーションの形式には, 2人以上の当事者間で複数方向に情報が交わされる相互型コミュニケーション, 特定の人に情報を送信するプッシュ型コミュニケーション, 自分の意思で必要な情報にアクセスするプル型コミュニケーションがある。
プル型コミュニケーションに該当するものはどれか。

stem.zh:
沟通的形式包括：在两个或两个以上的当事方之间多方向交换信息的交互型沟通；向特定的人发送信息的推送型（push）沟通；以及凭自己的意愿访问所需信息的拉取型（pull）沟通。
下列哪一项属于拉取型（pull）沟通？
stem.en:
Forms of communication include: interactive communication, in which information is exchanged in multiple directions among two or more parties; push communication, in which information is sent to specific people; and pull communication, in which one accesses needed information at one's own discretion.
Which of the following corresponds to pull communication?

ア.zh: 在公司内部的公告板网站上查看进度会议的日程。
ア.en: Looking up the schedule of a progress meeting on the company's internal bulletin board site.

イ.zh: 给主要成员打电话，协调进度会议的日程。
イ.en: Phoning the key members to coordinate the schedule of a progress meeting.

ウ.zh: 使用视频会议系统召开进度会议。
ウ.en: Holding a progress meeting using a video conferencing system.

エ.zh: 将进度会议的会议记录作为附件用电子邮件分发。
エ.en: Distributing the minutes of a progress meeting by attaching them to an email.

stem.zh: 下列哪一项是对设施管理（Facility Management）的说明？
stem.en: Which of the following describes facility management?

ア.zh: 为维护和管理 IT 服务的等级，确认 SLA 的遵守情况，并定期进行评审。
ア.en: To maintain and manage the level of IT services, it checks the compliance status of the SLA and reviews it periodically.

イ.zh: 这是一种从经营视角出发，对建筑物和设备等的持有、运用、维护等进行优化的方法。
イ.en: It is a technique for optimizing the holding, operation, and maintenance of buildings, equipment, and the like from a management perspective.

ウ.zh: 为提升产品和服务的质量，持续改进业务流程。
ウ.en: To improve the quality of products and services, it continuously improves business processes.

エ.zh: 在从零部件采购到制造、流通、销售这一系列流程中所参与的部门与企业之间，共享和管理信息。
エ.en: It shares and manages information among the departments and companies that participate in the series of processes from parts procurement to manufacturing, distribution, and sales.

stem.zh: A公司的内部审计员对本公司的业务连续性计划 (BCP) 实施了系统审计。作为系统审计的指摘事项之一，指出了在计算机电源的备份措施方面，由系统运维部门管理的不间断电源装置 (UPS) 的电池存在部分老化的问题。针对该指摘事项进行改善的责任人是谁？
stem.en: An internal auditor at Company A conducted a systems audit of the company's business continuity plan (BCP). As one of the findings of the systems audit, it was pointed out that, regarding the backup measures for the computer power supply, the batteries of the uninterruptible power supply (UPS) managed by the systems operations department had partially deteriorated. Who is the person responsible for carrying out improvements in response to this finding?

ア.zh: 系统运维部门负责人
ア.en: The head of the systems operations department

イ.zh: 系统开发的负责人
イ.en: The person responsible for systems development

ウ.zh: 内部审计员
ウ.en: The internal auditor

エ.zh: 采购了不间断电源装置的采购部门负责人
エ.en: The head of the purchasing department that purchased the uninterruptible power supply

2014h26a-q041.stem_jp_clean:
会計システムに次のようなアクセスの記録を蓄積する機能があるとき, この蓄積された情報を利用して実施するシステム監査の目的として, 適切なものはどれか。
入力されたユーザ ID とパスワードの組合せを, あらかじめ登録された内容と照合し, 一致する場合は会計業務メニュー画面へ遷移し, 一致しない場合はログインエラー画面へ遷移する。このとき, ユーザ ID, 照合日時及び照合結果をアクセス記録として蓄積する。

stem.zh:
会计系统具备如下记录访问情况并加以积累的功能。利用所积累的这些信息来实施系统审计时,其目的中恰当的是哪一项?
将所输入的用户 ID 与密码的组合,与事先登记的内容进行核对,一致时跳转到会计业务菜单画面,不一致时跳转到登录错误画面。此时,将用户 ID、核对时间以及核对结果作为访问记录加以积累。
stem.en:
An accounting system has the following function that accumulates access records. When a systems audit is conducted using this accumulated information, which of the following is an appropriate purpose?
The combination of the entered user ID and password is checked against the previously registered content; if they match, the system transitions to the accounting operations menu screen, and if they do not match, it transitions to the login error screen. At this time, the user ID, the check date and time, and the check result are accumulated as an access record.

ア.zh: 将智能手机中丢失会造成困扰的数据，加密后保存到智能手机以外的另一处地方。
ア.en: Store data on the smartphone that would be a problem if lost in an encrypted form at a location separate from the smartphone.

イ.zh: 由于智能手机也有可能感染病毒，因此安装防病毒软件。
イ.en: Since a smartphone can also be infected by viruses, install anti-virus software.

ウ.zh: 由于智能手机在购买时安全性最高，因此不进行 OS 更新而继续使用。
ウ.en: Since a smartphone is at its highest security level when purchased, keep using it without updating the OS.

エ.zh: 当智能手机丢失时，从远程进行强制锁定和强制删除数据。
エ.en: When a smartphone is lost, perform a remote forced lock and forced deletion of its data.

2014h26a-q051.stem_jp_clean:
次の認証方式の特徴に関する記述として，適切なものはどれか。

・利用者にはあらかじめ乱数表が渡されている。
・乱数表に印刷された数字は利用者ごとに異なる。
・システムが要求する乱数表の座標位置に記載された数字をパスワードとして入力する。（座標位置は毎回異なる。）
・正しいパスワードの入力が確認できた場合に認証が成功する。

〔乱数表の例〕

|   | A | B | C | D | E |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 37 | 24 | 99 | 91 | 76 |
| 2 | 77 | 75 | 64 | 88 | 52 |
| 3 | 94 | 84 | 11 | 41 | 58 |
| 4 | 66 | 61 | 18 | 26 | 31 |
| 5 | 47 | 60 | 81 | 23 | 29 |

システムが要求する乱数表の座標位置が B1, C2, D3, E4 の場合
パスワードは 24644131 となる。

stem.zh:
关于下述认证方式特征的描述，恰当的是哪一项？

・事先已向用户发放了随机数表。
・随机数表上印刷的数字因用户而异。
・将系统所要求的随机数表坐标位置上记载的数字作为口令输入。（坐标位置每次都不同。）
・确认输入了正确的口令时，认证成功。

〔随机数表示例〕

|   | A | B | C | D | E |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 37 | 24 | 99 | 91 | 76 |
| 2 | 77 | 75 | 64 | 88 | 52 |
| 3 | 94 | 84 | 11 | 41 | 58 |
| 4 | 66 | 61 | 18 | 26 | 31 |
| 5 | 47 | 60 | 81 | 23 | 29 |

当系统所要求的随机数表坐标位置为 B1、C2、D3、E4 时，
口令为 24644131。
stem.en:
Which of the following is an appropriate description of the characteristics of the authentication method below?

- A random number table is given to the user in advance.
- The numbers printed on the random number table differ for each user.
- The user enters, as a password, the numbers written at the coordinate positions on the random number table requested by the system. (The coordinate positions differ each time.)
- Authentication succeeds when entry of the correct password is confirmed.

[Example of a random number table]

|   | A | B | C | D | E |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 37 | 24 | 99 | 91 | 76 |
| 2 | 77 | 75 | 64 | 88 | 52 |
| 3 | 94 | 84 | 11 | 41 | 58 |
| 4 | 66 | 61 | 18 | 26 | 31 |
| 5 | 47 | 60 | 81 | 23 | 29 |

When the coordinate positions requested by the system are B1, C2, D3, E4,
the password is 24644131.

ア.zh: 即使系统所要求的随机数表坐标位置相同，口令每次也都不同。
ア.en: Even if the coordinate positions on the random number table requested by the system are the same, the password differs each time.

イ.zh: 它是基于知识的认证的一种。
イ.en: It is a type of knowledge-based authentication.

ウ.zh: 对于防止因重复使用被窃听的口令而进行的冒充，是有效的。
ウ.en: It is effective in preventing impersonation through reuse of an eavesdropped password.

エ.zh: 即使把随机数表交给他人也是安全的。
エ.en: It is safe even if you give the random number table to another person.

stem.zh: 将 IPv4 替换为 IPv6 所带来的效果中，哪一项是恰当的？

ア.zh: 即使可从互联网直接访问的 IP 地址与其他地址重复，也不会再产生问题。
ア.en: Even if an IP address that can be directly accessed from the Internet duplicates another, no problem will occur.

イ.zh: 可从互联网直接访问的 IP 地址不足的问题得到解决。
イ.en: The shortage of IP addresses that can be directly accessed from the Internet is resolved.

ウ.zh: 连接互联网时可以使用光纤。
ウ.en: Optical fiber becomes usable for connecting to the Internet.

エ.zh: 使用互联网时的通信速度变快。
エ.en: The communication speed when using the Internet becomes faster.

stem.zh: 下列关于多核处理器的描述中，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following statements about a multi-core processor is appropriate?

ア.zh: 通过让各个核心同时分别执行不同的处理，谋求提升整个系统的处理能力。
ア.en: By having each core execute a different process simultaneously, it aims to improve the overall processing capability of the system.

イ.zh: 通过让多个核心执行相同的处理，谋求提升处理结果的可靠性。
イ.en: By having multiple cores execute the same process, it aims to improve the reliability of the processing results.

ウ.zh: 多个核心仅由硬件控制，OS 无需特别的功能。
ウ.en: Multiple cores are controlled solely by hardware, and the OS requires no special functions.

エ.zh: 处理器的处理能力仅取决于核心数量，与时钟频率无关。
エ.en: The processing capability of the processor depends only on the number of cores and not on the clock frequency.

2014h26a-q054.stem_jp_clean: セキュリティに問題があるPCを社内ネットワークなどに接続させないことを目的とした仕組みであり, 外出先で使用したPCを会社に持ち帰った際に, ウイルスに感染していないことなどを確認するために利用するものはどれか。

stem.zh: 有一种机制，其目的是阻止存在安全问题的PC接入公司内部网络等。当把在外出场所使用过的PC带回公司时，可利用它来确认该PC未感染病毒等。这种机制是以下哪一个？
stem.en: There is a mechanism whose purpose is to prevent PCs with security problems from connecting to the internal corporate network and similar networks. When a PC that was used outside the company is brought back to the office, this mechanism is used to confirm that the PC is not infected with viruses, etc. Which of the following is it?

ア.zh: DMZ（隔离区）
ア.en: DMZ

イ.zh: IDS（入侵检测系统）
イ.en: IDS

ウ.zh: 隔离网络（检疫网络）
ウ.en: Quarantine network

エ.zh: 防火墙
エ.en: Firewall

stem.zh: 关于 PKI（公钥基础设施）中的数字证书，以下描述中正确的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following descriptions about digital certificates in PKI (Public Key Infrastructure) is appropriate?

ア.zh: 当通信内容遭到篡改时，由签发该数字证书的认证中心来检测。
ア.en: If the communication content has been tampered with, the certificate authority that issued the digital certificate detects it.

イ.zh: 当在电子邮件上附加数字证书后，发件人可以向认证中心查询该电子邮件的送达记录。
イ.en: If a digital certificate is attached to an email, the sender can inquire about the email's delivery record from the certificate authority.

ウ.zh: 由签发数字证书的认证中心保证电子邮件的发件人是公钥的所有者，从而使冒充行为能够被检测出来。
ウ.en: By having the certificate authority that issued the digital certificate guarantee that the email sender is the owner of the public key, impersonation can be detected.

エ.zh: 当从认证中心获得数字证书的发件人在电子邮件上附加数字签名后，认证中心会保留该电子邮件的副本。
エ.en: When a sender who has obtained a digital certificate from the certificate authority attaches a digital signature to an email, the certificate authority keeps a copy of that email.

ウ.zh: 黑客攻击（hacking）

stem.zh: 下列关于信息安全威胁之一的缓冲区溢出的说明，哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of buffer overflow, a threat in information security?

ア.zh: 持续向特定服务器发送大量连接请求，妨碍该服务器接受其他连接请求。
ア.en: Continuously sending a large number of connection requests to a specific server, preventing the server from accepting other connection requests.

イ.zh: 向特定的邮件地址发送大量电子邮件，使用户的邮箱被塞满，从而无法接收新的电子邮件。
イ.en: Sending a large number of emails to a specific email address, filling up the user's mailbox so that no new emails can be received.

ウ.zh: 窃听网络上传输的密码，并利用它进行非法访问。
ウ.en: Eavesdropping on passwords flowing through the network and using them to gain unauthorized access.

エ.zh: 向程序所准备的输入用数据区域输入超过其容量大小的数据，使程序产生预期之外的动作。
エ.en: Inputting data larger than the size of the input data area prepared by a program, causing it to behave in an unintended way.

stem.zh:

イ.en: (1) Authentication by possession / (2) Authentication by knowledge / (3) Authentication by physical (biometric) characteristics

stem.zh: 关于组织制定的信息安全策略的描述中，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate statement about an information security policy established by an organization?

ア.zh: 不仅是信息安全方针，连有关信息安全的规则和操作步骤也都应由经营者来制定。
ア.en: Not only the basic information security policy, but also the rules and procedures concerning information security should be established by management.

イ.zh: 不仅是信息安全方针，连有关信息安全的规则和操作步骤也都要求向组织外部公开。
イ.en: Not only the basic information security policy, but also the rules and procedures concerning information security are required to be disclosed to outside the organization.

ウ.zh: 有关信息安全的规则和操作步骤应当符合组织自身的实际情况，但最高层级的信息安全方针则要求直接采用行业标准的模板。
ウ.en: The rules and procedures concerning information security should be tailored to the organization's situation, but the top-level basic information security policy is required to directly adopt an industry-standard template.

エ.zh: 即使组织内的多个部门实施不同的信息安全对策，信息安全方针也应当在整个组织范围内保持统一。
エ.en: Even when multiple departments within an organization implement different information security measures, the basic information security policy should be unified across the entire organization.

stem.zh: 关于渗透测试的说明，恰当的是哪一项？

ア.zh: 对系统实际发动攻击并尝试入侵，从而发现安全方面的弱点。
ア.en: It discovers security weaknesses by actually attacking the system and attempting to break in.

イ.zh: 对系统施加超过正常水平的高负载，确认其是否能正常运行。
イ.en: It applies a higher-than-normal load to the system to check whether it functions correctly.

ウ.zh: 在修改程序后，确认该修改是否引起了预料之外的影响。
ウ.en: After modifying a program, it checks whether the modification has caused any unexpected effects.

エ.zh: 让用户实际使用系统，确认其易用性。
エ.en: It has users actually use the system to check its ease of use.

2014h26a-q075.stem_jp_clean:
あるWebサーバにおいて, 五つのディレクトリが図のような階層構造になっている。このとき, ディレクトリBに格納されているHTML文書からディレクトリEに格納されているファイルimg.jpgを指定するものはどれか。ここで, ディレクトリ及びファイルの指定は, 次の方法によるものとする。
〔ディレクトリ及びファイルの指定方法〕
(1) ファイルは, "ディレクトリ名/…/ディレクトリ名/ファイル名" のように, 経路上のディレクトリを順に "/" で区切って並べた後に "/" とファイル名を指定する。
(2) カレントディレクトリは "." で表す。
(3) 1階層上のディレクトリは ".." で表す。
(4) 始まりが "/" のときは, 左端にルートディレクトリが省略されているものとする。
(5) 始まりが "." ".." "/" のいずれでもないときは, 左端にカレントディレクトリ配下であることを示す "./" が省略されているものとする。

stem.zh:
在某个 Web 服务器中, 五个目录构成如图所示的层次结构。此时, 从存放在目录 B 中的 HTML 文档指定存放在目录 E 中的文件 img.jpg, 应使用下列哪一项? 这里, 目录及文件的指定按以下方法进行。
〔目录及文件的指定方法〕
(1) 文件按 "目录名/…/目录名/文件名" 的形式, 将路径上的目录依次用 "/" 分隔排列后, 再加上 "/" 和文件名来指定。
(2) 当前目录用 "." 表示。
(3) 上一层目录用 ".." 表示。
(4) 当开头为 "/" 时, 视为左端省略了根目录。
(5) 当开头不是 "." ".." "/" 中的任何一个时, 视为左端省略了表示位于当前目录之下的 "./"。
stem.en:
On a certain Web server, five directories form the hierarchical structure shown in the figure. In this case, which of the following specifies the file img.jpg stored in directory E, from an HTML document stored in directory B? Here, directories and files are specified by the following method.
[Method for specifying directories and files]
(1) A file is specified in the form "directory name/…/directory name/file name", listing the directories along the path in order separated by "/", followed by "/" and the file name.
(2) The current directory is represented by ".".
(3) The directory one level up is represented by "..".
(4) When the start is "/", the root directory is regarded as omitted at the left end.
(5) When the start is none of ".", "..", or "/", the "./" indicating that it is under the current directory is regarded as omitted at the left end.

ア.zh: ../A/D/E/img.jpg
ア.en: ../A/D/E/img.jpg

イ.zh: ../D/E/img.jpg
イ.en: ../D/E/img.jpg

ウ.zh: ./A/D/E/img.jpg
ウ.en: ./A/D/E/img.jpg

エ.zh: ./D/E/img.jpg
エ.en: ./D/E/img.jpg

(2) Each time one month passes, create a folder with a name that indicates the date it was backed up onto the USB drive, and make an incremental backup of the image files into it.

stem.zh:
针对结算系统引入前与引入后，对各负责人的作业时间进行了抽样，得到如下结果。基于该结果，求 A 公司每月整体的作业缩短时间，最合适的是哪一个？这里，A 公司每月的营业日为 20 天，每天的申请处理件数为 10 次。
〔抽样结果〕
(1) 申请人原本 1 次申请需要 12 分钟，缩短为 3 分钟。
(2) 事务负责人整体上，1 天与交通费结算业务相关的作业，由 48 分钟缩短为 16 分钟。
(3) 审批人原本 1 次申请的审批需要 72 秒，缩短为 12 秒。
(4) 会计负责人整体上，1 个月与交通费结算业务相关的作业，由 13 小时缩短为 1 小时。
stem.en:
Before and after introducing a settlement system, the work time of each person in charge was sampled, with the following results. Based on these results, which is the most appropriate value for company A's total monthly reduction in work time? Here, company A has 20 business days per month, and the number of applications processed per day is 10. 
[Sampling results] 
(1) For an applicant, what used to take 12 minutes per application was reduced to 3 minutes. 
(2) For the clerical staff as a whole, the work related to transportation expense settlement per day was reduced from 48 minutes to 16 minutes. 
(3) For an approver, approval of one application was reduced from 72 seconds to 12 seconds. 
(4) For the accounting staff as a whole, the work related to transportation expense settlement per month was reduced from 13 hours to 1 hour.
